channel.title: Robotics on Lav-Aniya's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Robotics on Lav-Aniya's Site

item.title: Autonomous Drone Navigation using 3D Gaussian Splatting and Foundation Models
item.description: An end-to-end autonomous drone navigation system combining 3D Gaussian Splatting, DINOv2 for Visual Place Recognition, and hybrid RRT*/APF planning.
